title: module-map
description: Single source of truth for module architecture. Drives ESLint boundaries, the scope resolver, and module docs.

name.description: Unique module id. Matches the folder under src/modules/.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the module folder.

description.description: One line: what this module is responsible for.

gates.description: Gate profile. "polish" opts out of the coverage floor only; everything else stays on. "shell" also opts out of the coverage floor, and additionally caps the module's non-test source at 200 lines (module-sync) — shells must stay thin or become full modules. Absent = "full".

allowedImports.description: Names of other modules this module may import (via their index.ts). Empty = leaf module.

allowedExternals.description: External npm packages this module may import. Absent = unrestricted (any package). Present = the module may import ONLY these packages (subpaths like "pkg/sub" count as allowed); empty array = pure module, no external packages. node: builtins and relative/internal imports are always allowed; other workspace modules stay governed by allowedImports.
